summary: Provisional ownership registry (ownership.json) and append-only mailbox (mailbox.jsonl) initialized by T00. All canonical ownership entries established for workflow artifacts, verification records T00-T06, planned helper/test files, and planned skill docs. T00 verification record created at verification/T00.json with Phase 3 ownership_evidence (pre_registry_bootstrap) and security_trigger_evidence (not_triggered).

T00 provisional ownership registry and mailbox bootstrap complete. T01+ must use the provisional ownership/evidence protocol and cannot proceed without matching ownership evidence in their per-task verification record. Every completed task T01-T06 must produce its own verification/TXX.json with base Phase 2 fields plus Phase 3 ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence, or explicit not-applicable/not-triggered evidence. Ownership violations are hard workflow policy failures. See plan.md strict-completion matrix for per-criterion task assignments.

T01 protocol reminder: each T01-T06 task must include ownership_evidence with attribution_method, task_start/task_end/task_local/preexisting changed files, actual_changed_files_source, actual_changed_files, and changed_files[] entries mapping each task-local file to its ownership entry_id with coverage_status. Security_trigger_evidence must include triggered_categories (empty if not triggered), decision (not_triggered or triggered_evidence_recorded), evidence_refs, and notes. Omission of either evidence field is a task review failure.

T01 complete. Created src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts.test.ts with comprehensive Phase 3 helper contract tests covering mailbox schema (8 message_types, 5 statuses, 11 canonical fields), ownership registry/entry schema (5 modes, 4 statuses, 6 operations, 10 canonical fields, target_type path-only, mode/operation/actor invariants), OwnershipEvidenceSchema (5 attribution methods, 4 coverage statuses, changed_files entries, omitted-evidence detection), global path-coverage helper, SecurityTriggerCategorySchema (9 categories), SecurityTriggerEvidenceSchema (3 decisions), VerificationRecordSchema passthrough with Phase 3 evidence, and purity assertion. RED confirmed: module does not exist. verification/T01.json created with ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence.

T02 complete. Implemented src/hooks/workflow-coordination-artifacts.ts as a pure Zod helper module (only zod import). All 189 T01 contract tests pass (GREEN), typecheck passes clean. Exports: MailboxMessageTypeSchema (8 values), MailboxStatusSchema (5 values), MailboxMessageSchema (11 fields), OwnershipModeSchema (5 values), OwnershipStatusSchema (4 values), OwnershipTargetTypeSchema (path only), AllowedOperationSchema (6 values), OwnershipEntrySchema (10 fields + path constraint + mode/operation/actor invariant refinements), OwnershipRegistrySchema, AttributionMethodSchema (5 values), OwnershipCoverageStatusSchema (4 values), OwnershipEvidenceSchema (10 fields), SecurityTriggerCategorySchema (9 categories), SecurityTriggerEvidenceSchema, path helpers (mailboxPath, ownershipPath), validation wrappers, findUnownedChangedFiles, findOmittedOwnershipEntries. verification/T02.json created with ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence.

T02 quality findings fixed. Tightened exclusive_write/sequenced_write owner semantics to reject invalid non-task owners such as not-a-task unless owner_task_id is orchestrator with documented pre-registry provenance. Tightened OwnershipEvidenceSchema path validation for all changed-file path arrays and changed_files[].path using exact repo-relative constraints. Added focused negative regression tests in helper test file. Verification now passes: 196 pass, 0 fail, 260 expect() calls; typecheck passes clean. verification/T02.json updated.

Ownership registry correction: src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts.test.ts converted from T01 exclusive_write to sequenced_write shared between T01 and T02. T02 needed to update T01 tests for reviewer-confirmed test defects found during T02 execution. New entry own-T02-helper-test-fix added with sequenced_write for T02, scoped to reviewer-confirmed test-defect fixes only. T01 entry own-T01-helper-test updated to sequenced_write with explicit policy_summary noting T02's allowed scope.

T02 second quality fix. Backslash-separated paths now rejected in ownership targets and all evidence path arrays. Helper-test conflict resolved with own-T02-helper-test-fix entry (coverage_status: covered). Verification: 201 pass, 0 fail, 265 expect() calls; typecheck clean.

T02 remaining reviewer findings fixed. Path validation now rejects any leading drive prefix matching ^[A-Za-z]:, including C:secret.ts and C:foo, in ownership targets and evidence paths. read_only and shared_append owner_task_id validation now accepts only task-like ids or orchestrator. Verification: 207 pass, 0 fail, 271 expect() calls; typecheck clean.

T03 complete. Created src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts with 92 Phase 3-1 skill markdown contract tests across 13 describe blocks. RED confirmed: 84 fail, 8 pass. Tests assert canonical Phase 3-1 coordination reference sections in plan/execute SKILL.md (mailbox/ownership enum values, mode/operation invariants, ownership_evidence/security_trigger_evidence fields), mailbox lifecycle, ownership registry hard-failure policy, hyperplan-lite 6-perspective challenge, security trigger categories/boundedness, strict-completion matrix statuses, Phase 3-2 roadmap preservation, and explicit exclusions. Tests import canonical schemas from the helper module for enum/status value consistency. verification/T03.json created with ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence.

T03 reviewer findings fixed. Contract tests now explicitly assert all ownership_evidence fields including preexisting_changed_files_touched, attribution_limitations, actual_changed_files_source, actual_changed_files; changed_files[] operation alongside path/ownership_entry_id/coverage_status; security_trigger_evidence fields and decisions not_triggered/triggered_evidence_recorded/route_back_required; durable docs/supercode/<work_id>/mailbox.jsonl and ownership.json paths; narrow Phase 3-1 canonical headings; stage-specific mailbox/ownership/security assertions; target_type path-only and glob deferred; and exclusion checks that reject positive implemented/enabled language outside deferred/excluded contexts. RED reconfirmed: 8 pass, 93 fail, 112 expect() calls; typecheck clean.

T03 second reviewer round complete. 5 findings fixed: (1) canonical mailbox field name assertions for all 11 fields in plan coordination section; (2) ownership registry/entry field name assertions (work_id, entries, 10 entry fields) in both plan and execute coordination sections; (3) security_trigger_evidence notes assertion added; (4) ownership_evidence notes assertion added; (5) attribution method enum values (executor_edit_log, before_after_snapshot, reviewer_confirmed, pre_registry_bootstrap, not_applicable) and coverage status enum values (covered, uncovered, conflict, not_applicable) asserted in canonical coordination sections. RED reconfirmed: 8 pass, 100 fail, 119 expect() calls, 108 tests; typecheck clean.

T04 complete. Added Phase 3-1 coordination contract content to all five skill docs: plan/SKILL.md (canonical coordination reference + hyperplan-lite checklist), execute/SKILL.md (execution ownership reference with ownership_evidence/security_trigger_evidence), pre-execute-alignment/SKILL.md (ownership/conflict-sensitive batching), final-review/SKILL.md (Phase 3-1 coordination checks), spec/SKILL.md (security trigger identification + Phase 3-2 deferred scope). All 108 contract tests pass (GREEN), all Phase 2/Phase 3 helper tests pass, typecheck passes. verification/T04.json created with ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence.

T04 reviewer findings addressed. (1) Fixed Phase 2 contract test compatibility: added stripPhase31Sections helper so Phase 3-1 sections in skill docs are excluded from Phase 2 scope integrity checks (sections 11, 13). (2) Added mailbox handoff expectations to pre-execute-alignment/SKILL.md. (3) Spelled out exact ownership mode/operation invariants in plan/SKILL.md. (4) Added ownership failure rules subsection to final-review/SKILL.md. (5) Updated T04 verification record with test fix and review changes. Verification: 451 pass, 0 fail (136 Phase 2 + 108 Phase 3 + 207 helper), typecheck clean.

Ownership registry correction (second): entry own-T04-phase2-test-fix added for src/__tests__/phase2-artifact-state-contract.test.ts with owner T04, mode exclusive_write, allowed_operations read/write, scoped to Phase 2 compatibility test fix (stripPhase31Sections helper). This is a T00 bootstrap correction recorded by T00 on behalf of the registry, not a T04-owned registry write.

T05 complete. Created src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts-current-work.test.ts with opt-in current-work Phase 3 coordination artifact validation. Test validates ownership.json (43 entries pass OwnershipRegistrySchema), mailbox.jsonl (16 records pass MailboxMessageSchema at initial T05 completion), verification records T00-T05 (Phase 2 VerificationRecordSchema + Phase 3 ownership_evidence/security_trigger_evidence), and plan.md strict-completion matrix rows/statuses. Test skips when WORK_ID is unset. No structural changes to ownership.json or mailbox.jsonl were needed; both were already schema-compliant after T02. verification/T05.json created with ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence.

T05 quality findings fixed. Tightened current-work validation to parse the actual plan.md strict-completion matrix table and require exactly 11 numbered approved success-criterion rows, canonical statuses only, and no extra criteria. Added table-driven ownership coverage checks for mailbox/ledger shared_append rules, read-only plan.md, orchestrator-owned state/final-review, sequenced ownership.json, verification records, and helper/test artifacts. Strengthened verification evidence checks to fail uncovered/conflict changed_files entries, missing actual_changed_files coverage, and ownership operation mismatches against registry allowed_operations. Corrected T05 evidence/mailbox count consistency.

T05 remaining quality findings fixed. Current-work validation now requires each changed_files[].ownership_entry_id to be non-null for changed files, resolve to an existing ownership.json entry, match the changed file path exactly via ownership entry target, have active status or valid released bootstrap status for create/write evidence, and allow the recorded operation. The ownership expectation table now covers every minimum T05 target listed in plan.md, including spec.md, evidence.md, all verification records T00-T06, helper tests, current-work test, all five skill docs, and workflow artifacts.

T06 final verification complete. bun test: 1036 pass, 36 skip, 0 fail. bun run typecheck: clean. WORK_ID current-work validation: 28 pass, 493 expect() calls. Scope boundary review: no new public stage, no new skill dir, no per-worker worktree, no OS/distributed lock, no full OMO Team Mode, no raw ulw, no free agent chat, no runtime broker, no git/fs runtime in helper, no glob ownership. Helper purity confirmed. Evidence carrier locations documented. verification/T06.json created with ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence.

T06 review finding fixed. Current-work validation now includes T06 in REQUIRED_VERIFICATION_TASKS and the test label states T00-T06. WORK_ID validation passes with 28 pass, 526 expect() calls and validates verification records T00-T06 with base Phase 2 plus Phase 3 ownership/security evidence. No-WORK_ID skip passes, full bun test passes, and typecheck passes. verification/T06.json updated with this narrow test change evidence.

Ownership registry correction (third): added own-T06-current-work-test-fix for src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts-current-work.test.ts with owner T06, mode sequenced_write, allowed_operations read/write, scoped to T06 final-verification defect fixes only. T05 entry converted from exclusive_write to sequenced_write to allow serial sharing. T00 bootstrap correction; T06 does not own ownership.json.

T06 ownership compliance review fixes applied. (1) T06.json changed_files now cites own-T06-current-work-test-fix instead of T05's entry. (2) Current-work validation now verifies each changed_files[] ownership entry has owner_task_id matching the record's task_id, with explicit exceptions for orchestrator-owned/shared_append entries and pre-registry read-only provenance. (3) Ownership expectation table updated to reflect sequenced_write for current-work test (T05+T06). WORK_ID validation: 28 pass, 574 expect() calls. Full regression: 1036 pass. Typecheck: clean.
